seoDescription: Guidance for verifying official GenFix communication channels and reducing fraud risk during procurement and support requests.

hero.heading: Website Safety Alert
hero.body: Guidance for verifying official GenFix communication channels and reducing fraud risk during procurement and support requests.

sections.title: Verification Steps
sections.body: Use these checks before sharing project details, issuing purchase orders, or actioning payment instructions.

cards.title: Confirm Contact Channels
cards.description: Use phone numbers and email addresses published on GenFix official pages when verifying requests.

cards.title: Validate Scope Documentation
cards.description: Cross-check quotation details, ABN records, and scope descriptions with your known account contacts.

cards.title: Escalate Unusual Requests
cards.description: Urgent payment changes, altered bank details, or non-standard communication channels should be escalated immediately.

sections.title: Risk Reduction Practices
sections.body: Consistent procurement controls and communication protocols reduce fraud exposure across distributed project teams.

cards.title: Approved Vendor Workflow
cards.description: Keep a controlled supplier register and verify any account changes through known internal escalation pathways.

cards.title: Information Security Hygiene
cards.description: Use role-based access, shared mailbox controls, and internal approval checks for critical procurement actions.

cards.title: Training And Awareness
cards.description: Run periodic awareness updates so field and office teams recognize common impersonation and phishing patterns.
